purge_description: Purge messages from a channel (monitored channels only)
purge_count_description: Number of messages to delete (leave empty to clear the whole channel)
dashboard_cmd_desc:
Manage all your feeds, settings, and premium subscriptions comfortably on our website.

Need help or want to suggest a feature? Join our Discord server!
